text: Spin off an aim branch to a new .bowman repo (export + conservative prune)
description:
Export a branch of the aim graph into a separate .bowman, optionally pruning it from the source — the mechanism behind "this is a different endeavor, spin it out."

Semantics (worked example A>B>C, D child of A and B, export root B):
- COPY to spin-off = selected root(s) + ALL transitive supporters (everything that contributes to the roots, i.e. descendants in the supporting direction). Ancestors are NOT copied. -> spin-off = {B, C, D}.
- DELETE from source (optional) = roots + descendants that ONLY contribute to the selection (no supported-aim outside the copy set). Shared aims stay -> overlap. -> source keeps {A, D}.
- Connections: edges with both ends in the copy set move/copy with it (C->B, D->B to spin-off). The shared D->A edge stays in source. Edges crossing the seam (B->A, where A is an uncopied ancestor) are DROPPED for now.
- Keep aim IDs stable (so overlap can later become real cross-repo links, 5a45cb28).
- Multiple roots selectable (usually one).
- Conservative: never delete a shared aim; dry-run preview + explicit confirm before any deletion.

Target path: user-specified. If dir missing, create it; if it lacks /.bowman, add it; if a .bowman already exists there, warn (deferred: proceed by integrating as free-floating).

reflections.context: Status-reconciliation sweep; spin-off base aim looked likely-done given recent git activity.
reflections.outcome: Confirmed via the spin-off commit series (shared engine + tRPC router + frontend apply) and marked done; kept the explicitly-deferred remainder aims open.
reflections.effectiveness: git log was the fast oracle for feature-completion across a multi-commit feature.
reflections.lesson: Distinguish a 'base feature done' aim from its 'deferred remainder' siblings — mark the base done without sweeping the deferred ones.

status.comment: Implemented across the spin-off commit series: shared planSpinOff/computeSpinOff engine (42988d3), spinOff tRPC router preview+apply (6393d03), frontend preview/apply incl. open-in-new-tab (923e83e, 1b598b0, f751663). Base export + conservative prune is shipped. Deferred remainders are tracked separately (c8e2e450 cross-repo-link-at-seam, 3af443da spin-off-into-existing) and remain open.
